title: SessionSendMessageRequest
description: Typed broker-mediated transcript append request. This contract is transcript durability only and does not submit execution triggers.

session_id.description: Canonical session identity to append interaction activity to.

role.description: Transcript role for the submitted message.

content_text.description: Primary display text for the submitted transcript message.

idempotency_key.description: Optional caller-supplied idempotency identity for retries.

related_links.description: Optional typed links carried with the message for run/approval/artifact/audit correlation.
